coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide payment processing supporting credit/debit cards and bank transfers with 3D Secure.
task_titles: Enforce payment processing supporting credit/debit cards security controls

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Customer — The Customer should provide KYC (Know Your Customer) verification with document upload and identity checks.
The system should provide transaction history with filtering, search, and CSV/PDF export.
task_titles: Implement transaction history with filtering, search, and CSV/PDF export workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Merchant — The Merchant should provide merchant dashboard for settlements, chargebacks, and revenue analytics.
The system should provide recurring billing and subscription management with automatic retry on failure.
task_titles: Implement recurring billing and subscription management with automatic retry on failure workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide multi-currency conversion with live exchange rate integration.
The system should maintain PCI-DSS compliance.
The system should meet p99 response-time SLO.
The system should run in under 500ms per transaction..
The system should support rate limiting and IP allowlisting.
task_titles: Implement limiting and IP allowlisting support workflow

risk_signals: External integrations are present and will need interface contracts plus vendor coordination.
Compliance-oriented requirements are present and should be validated early to avoid late rework.
Non-functional scope is substantial, so quality engineering should run in parallel with feature delivery.
3 high-complexity tasks sit on the roadmap and deserve early prototyping.

committee_brief.domain_inference: Likely domain: fintech, payments, and billing operations.
committee_brief.scope_assessment: Scope includes 5 functional task(s) and 5 non-functional task(s); 0 task(s) sit outside the confirmed baseline because they are optional or low-confidence.
assumption_log: Dependency sequencing was inferred for 6 task(s) to produce an executable implementation order beyond the raw prose order.
committee_brief.confidence_signal: Planning confidence is high: no low-confidence tasks were detected in the current plan.
committee_brief.graph_summary: 10 requirements -> 10 atomic tasks across 4 delivery sprints. Critical delivery path: T002 -> T009 -> T006 (3 hops, ~11 story points, estimated 6 weeks with a 2-person team). Coordination hotspot: Establish KYC compliance controls blocks 6 downstream tasks and should be closed by Sprint 1. Parallel execution opportunity: 4 tasks can start immediately in Sprint 1. Effort breakdown: 294 estimated hours | FR: 118h | NFR: 176h.
